message:
chore: update beads tracker - close bd-ml2r.11.4

Structured evidence log schema implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -426,7 +426,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: exhaustive unit tests for FNX branches","description":"Goal
Add comprehensive unit test suites across fm-core/fm-parser/fm-layout/fm-cli/fm-wasm for FNX paths.

Scope
- Happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and failure paths.
- Determinism assertions on repeated runs.
- Projection policy correctness assertions.

Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage includes all newly introduced FNX branches.
- Tests are deterministic and non-flaky.
- Failing tests provide actionable diagnostics.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.780420136Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.297704425Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fnx","testing","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.232009270Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.297648309Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.780420136Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.523481844Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.584819824Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.644718647Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: CLI+WASM end-to-end scenario scripts","description":"Goal
Create end-to-end test scripts exercising real user flows across CLI and wasm/browser surfaces.

Scope
- Scenario suites for baseline, fnx-enabled, strict-mode, and timeout fallback paths.
- Scripted assertions for outputs, diagnostics, and witness payloads.
- Artifact capture for diffing and reproducibility.

Acceptance Criteria
- E2E scripts run in CI and locally with consistent results.
- Scenarios include large/complex/pathological diagrams.
- Logs and artifacts are retained for regression investigations.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.842265447Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.175949390Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cli","e2e","fnx","testing","wasm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.842265447Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.704383903Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.760458130Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.066010277Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.121243437Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.175896471Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.11.3","title":"[FNX] QA subtask: deterministic replay and benchmark regression harness","description":"Goal
Build deterministic replay + benchmark harness for quality, latency, and determinism regressions.

Scope
- Re-run identical scenarios multiple times with hash checks.
- Track parse/analysis/layout/render timings and variance.
- Compare baseline vs fnx-enabled quality metrics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Determinism replay harness is automated.
- Benchmark outputs feed rollout decisions.
- Threshold breaches fail CI with actionable reports.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.975953643Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:23:24.183314415Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmark","determinism","fnx","qa"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.929421107Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.975953643Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.816898462Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.11.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:15.873404177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

- Evidence bundle layout for CI artifacts.
- Validation lints to reject incomplete log payloads.

Acceptance Criteria
- Log schema is documented and machine-validated.
- All FNX e2e scripts emit schema-compliant logs.
- Evidence bundles are consistent and easy to inspect.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12","title":"[FNX] Compatibility, migration safety, and trust-preserving rollout track","description":"Goal
Protect users from regressions by making FNX integration explicitly compatibility-aware, measurable, and rollback-safe.

Scope
- Guarantee fnx-off baseline behavior remains stable and verifiable.
- Quantify fnx-on deltas with explicit quality/performance thresholds.
- Provide migration guidance and safety checks for users enabling FNX features.
- Establish canary and rollback procedures across CLI and WASM surfaces.

User Impact
- Prevent surprising behavior changes for existing users.
- Build trust with transparent before/after evidence.
- Reduce support burden via deterministic compatibility diagnostics.

Acceptance Criteria
- Baseline compatibility matrix exists and is test-enforced.
- FNX-on vs FNX-off differential reports are generated and reviewed.
- Migration guardrails and rollback playbook are documented and tested.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.449468653Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:31:14.201461133Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compatibility","fnx","qa","rollout","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.449468653Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.839746689Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.897468963Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.780527088Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":132,"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Compatibility track now inherits the same mandatory verification contract as all other FNX beads; this closes prior coverage gap and guarantees canary/rollback decisions are backed by deterministic evidence and reproducible CLI+WASM scenario logs.","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:31:14Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12.1","title":"[FNX] Compatibility subtask: fnx-off baseline snapshot and invariants","description":"Goal
Create deterministic fnx-off baseline snapshots and enforce no-regression invariants.

Scope
- Capture parser/layout/render snapshots for representative corpora in fnx-off mode.
- Define strict invariants for output stability and diagnostics consistency.
- Add CI checks to prevent accidental baseline drift.

Acceptance Criteria
- Snapshot corpus covers common + edge-case diagrams.
- Baseline checks are deterministic and CI-enforced.
- Drift reports include actionable diff summaries.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.525867796Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:27:56.286873849Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compatibility","determinism","fnx","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.525867796Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.951972867Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.008192897Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.12.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:42.067866779Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.12.2","title":"[FNX] Compatibility subtask: differential quality/performance reporting","description":"Goal
Generate systematic FNX-on vs FNX-off differential reports with defined acceptance thresholds.

Scope
- Compare quality metrics, diagnostics changes, and latency across modes.
- Classify deltas as expected-improvement, neutral, or regression.
- Gate rollout on threshold compliance.

Acceptance Criteria
- Differential reports are reproducible and machine-readable.
- Threshold policy is explicit and versioned.
- Regressions fail gates with clear root-cause pointers.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

@@ -453,7 +453,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.8","title":"[FNX] Program rollout gate (Phase-1 + Phase-2)","description":"Goal
Act as the final program-level rollout gate that closes only after both Phase-1 and Phase-2 rollout gates are complete with evidence.

Scope
- Aggregate launch readiness across:
  - Phase-1 undirected diagnostics/intelligence rollout (`bd-ml2r.8.1`)
  - Phase-2 directed capability rollout (`bd-ml2r.8.2`)
- Ensure benchmark, determinism, compatibility, migration-safety, and rollback evidence are complete for each phase.
- Publish final enablement policy and long-term maintenance posture.

Why this structure
- Phase-gated rollout avoids delaying user value from Phase-1 while preserving full-scope completion requirements for Phase-2.
- No functionality is removed; this only improves sequencing and operational safety.

Acceptance Criteria
- Both phase gates are complete with reproducible evidence artifacts.
- Program-level go/no-go rationale is documented with explicit risk disposition.
- Final policy includes default states, canary progression, and rollback triggers by phase.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.316420292Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:39:12.423420638Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmark","determinism","fnx","rollout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.8","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.316420292Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.8","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:38:18.136381390Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.8","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:38:19.278923381Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":129,"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Rollout gate policy: do not close this bead until bd-ml2r.9.4, bd-ml2r.10.3, bd-ml2r.11.1, bd-ml2r.11.2, bd-ml2r.11.3, and bd-ml2r.11.4 are complete with evidence artifacts and deterministic replay results.","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:23:25Z"},{"id":133,"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Planning optimization (2026-02-27): refactored monolithic rollout into explicit phase gates (bd-ml2r.8.1 phase-1 and bd-ml2r.8.2 phase-2).  {"id":"bd-ml2r.8.1","title":"[FNX] Rollout gate: Phase-1 enablement (undirected intelligence + diagnostics)","description":"Goal
Enable production-ready Phase-1 rollout (undirected structural intelligence + diagnostics + UX controls) with strict determinism and regression guardrails.

Scope
- Gate launch of fnx-assisted undirected diagnostics, tie-break enrichment, telemetry, and user controls.
- Require compatibility baseline + differential reporting + migration safeguards before widening exposure.
- Validate rollback signals and canary policy for Phase-1 surfaces.

User Impact
- Delivers immediate value sooner (diagnostics clarity, safer defaults, actionable controls) without waiting on directed algorithm upstream work.
- Preserves trust with deterministic evidence and rollback readiness.

Acceptance Criteria
- Phase-1 go/no-go decision is evidence-backed and reproducible.
- Canary and rollback checks pass for Phase-1 feature set.
- Default policy for Phase-1 modes is explicitly documented.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.8.2","title":"[FNX] Rollout gate: Phase-2 directed capability enablement","description":"Goal
Gate Phase-2 rollout for directed-layout semantics and upstream fnx directed capability adoption.

Scope
- Validate directed algorithm readiness, determinism, and version compatibility.
- Run directed-specific quality/performance/parity scenarios and regression gates.
- Decide enablement policy for any directed fnx-assisted behaviors.

User Impact
- Prevents exposing immature directed behavior while preserving a clear path to deeper future improvements.
- Ensures phase-2 capabilities are only shipped with strong evidence and rollback confidence.

Acceptance Criteria
- Directed capability matrix and version policy are validated against actual integration results.
- Directed scenario suite passes determinism, quality, and performance gates.
- Directed rollout policy and rollback triggers are explicitly documented.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

-{"id":"bd-ml2r.9","title":"[FNX] User-facing controls and semantic enhancement surfaces","description":"Goal
Turn fnx integration into directly visible user value, not just internal algorithm improvements.

Scope
- Expose user-facing controls for fnx analysis behavior in config and CLI.
- Add semantic enhancement options driven by fnx analysis (centrality/critical-path emphasis, structural insights).
- Add clear UX copy for why a diagnostic/recommendation is emitted and what the user can do.
- Provide practical examples demonstrating when to enable/disable fnx modes.

User Value
- Faster debugging of large/complex diagrams.
- Better readability through optional semantic emphasis.
- Transparent and controllable behavior instead of hidden heuristics.

Acceptance Criteria
- New user-facing knobs are documented and discoverable.
- Enhancements are opt-in/feature-gated with deterministic defaults.
- Example corpus shows measurable readability/diagnostic clarity improvement.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.9.2","title":"[FNX] UX subtask: optional centrality/critical-path semantic styling","description":"Goal
Implement optional semantic auto-styling powered by fnx metrics for high-information diagrams.

Scope
- Centrality-driven node emphasis (heatmap/intensity classes).
- Optional critical-path edge emphasis for flow readability.
- Style output compatible with SVG, terminal where feasible, and wasm APIs.

Acceptance Criteria
- Styling is deterministic for identical input/config.
- Default output unchanged unless feature is enabled.
- Visual regression tests verify expected style classes and element counts.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","title":"[FNX] UX subtask: structural recommendations and remediation hints","description":"Goal
Add structural recommendation UX that translates fnx findings into concrete user guidance.

Scope
- Suggest simplifications (bridge hotspots, articulation choke points, disconnected islands).
- Provide recommendation categories with confidence and rationale.
- Support CLI + wasm payloads for front-end display.

Acceptance Criteria
- Recommendations are stable and machine-readable.
- Each recommendation includes rationale + suggested remediation.
- E2E scenarios validate recommendations for representative anti-pattern graphs.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.334729935Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:28:51.355492549Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["diagnostics","fnx","parser","ux","wasm"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.11.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:25:41.010443511Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.457686835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:13.513701911Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:12.334729935Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.9.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:28:51.352909859Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
